member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.CommonReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from api/isa/v1/common.proto

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode
member.summary:
ErrorCode enumerates the stable error codes consumers may switch on. Values are lowercase snake_case at the wire level. Additions are non-breaking; renames are forbidden.
This is the union of every error code previously defined per service. Values 0-8 matched both legacy catalogs. From 9 onward the numeric assignments follow the former ZyINS layout (including LICENSE_LOCKED at 9). Legacy RapidSign emitted RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED as 9 and NOT_IMPLEMENTED as 10; those semantics now wire as 10 and 15 respectively. Pre-1.0 consolidation: treat any cross-service numeric error code migration as an explicit consumer update, not a silent rename. New services must add missing codes here rather than locally.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server; indicates a proto deserialization defect on the client side.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.TokenExpired
member.summary: Bearer token or license has expired. Client should refresh.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.InvalidToken
member.summary: Bearer token or license signature does not validate.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.Forbidden
member.summary: Authenticated but lacking scope for this operation.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.NotFound
member.summary: Resource does not exist or is not visible to the caller.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.MethodNotAllowed
member.summary: HTTP method not allowed on this path.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.Conflict
member.summary: State conflict (e.g. already activated, already revoked, document already signed).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.ValidationError
member.summary: Request body failed schema or domain validation. `param` is set.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.LicenseLocked
member.summary: License is locked (too many device registrations or admin action).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.RateLimitExceeded
member.summary: Rate limit exceeded. `Retry-After` header is set.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.InternalError
member.summary: Unhandled server fault. Request ID identifies the log entry.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.BadGateway
member.summary: Upstream dependency returned an unusable response.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.GatewayTimeout
member.summary: Upstream dependency did not respond within the budget.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ErrorCode.NotImplemented
member.summary: Capability not yet implemented (e.g. PDF renderer not configured).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.Scope
member.summary: Scope enumerates the bearer-token scopes recognized across the ISA platform. Enum member names gained a `RAPIDSIGN_` prefix so additional services can add scopes without colliding; wire integers for the four RapidSign scopes are unchanged from the legacy `SCOPE_DOCUMENTS_*` assignments. Generated symbol names therefore change — migrate callers when regenerating SDKs.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.Scope.RapidsignDocumentsRead
member.summary: `rapidsign:documents:read` — fetch signature state and signed PDFs.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails
member.summary: ProblemDetails is the RFC 7807 error body extended with three machine-readable fields per ADR-012. Programmatic consumers MUST switch on `code`; `type` is preserved for RFC compliance but is not the match surface.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.Type
member.summary: A URI reference that identifies the problem type per RFC 7807. Stable across API versions but not the primary match key — use `code` instead.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.Title
member.summary: Short human-readable summary. May change without notice.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.Code
P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.Detail
member.summary: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.Instance
member.summary: Request path that generated this error.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.RequestId
member.summary: Unique request identifier for support and debugging.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.Param
member.summary: JSON-pointer-style path to the field that failed validation. Omitted entirely for non-validation errors.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProblemDetails.DocUrl
member.summary: Link to the docs page explaining this error and its remediation.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.HealthReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from api/isa/v1/health.proto

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ServingStatus
member.summary: ServingStatus enumerates the probe outcomes shared by the liveness and readiness responses. Wire values are lowercase (`serving`, `not_serving`, `unknown`).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ServingStatus.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server; indicates a proto deserialization defect on the client side.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ServingStatus.Serving
member.summary: Component is healthy and accepting traffic.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ServingStatus.NotServing
member.summary: Component is unhealthy; the overall probe returns 503 via ProblemDetails when any required component is in this state.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ServingStatus.Unknown
member.summary: Component state could not be determined within the probe budget (e.g. timeout without a definitive success or failure).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.GetHealthRequest
member.summary: GetHealthRequest is the empty request body for GET /health.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.HealthResponse
member.summary: HealthResponse reports liveness (in-process state only). Emitted with HTTP 200; a failing probe returns ProblemDetails on HTTP 503 instead.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.HealthResponse.Status
member.summary: Overall liveness status. On HTTP 200 this is always `SERVING`.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.HealthResponse.Version
member.summary: Semantic version of the running binary (e.g. `1.42.0`). Matches the git tag when deployed from a release; empty for local builds.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.HealthResponse.BuildSha
member.summary: Full git commit SHA the binary was built from. Echoed into logs and used by support to correlate behaviour with a revision.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.HealthResponse.StartedAt
member.summary: Wall-clock time at which the process started accepting requests. Paired with the current time to compute uptime client-side.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.GetReadinessRequest
member.summary: GetReadinessRequest is the empty request body for GET /ready.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse
member.summary: ReadinessResponse is the shared readiness body. Field numbers 1–6 match the historical ZyINS layout so existing binary decoders stay compatible; JSON field names for the two typed probes may differ from legacy RapidSign (`storage` / `emailer`) — callers must migrate to the unified keys (`db` / `cache`) alongside this consolidation.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse.Ready
member.summary: Overall readiness decision. True iff every required sub-probe returned `SERVING`. A single `NOT_SERVING` among the required probes flips this to false and the endpoint returns 503.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse.Status
member.summary: Overall status mirror of `ready` using the shared enum. Clients that switch on `ServingStatus` across endpoints should read this field; `ready` is retained for simple boolean checks.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse.Db
member.summary: Primary dependency probe (ZyINS: database pool; RapidSign: document storage). Same wire type across products; name reflects the ZyINS canonical field label.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse.Cache
member.summary: Secondary dependency probe (ZyINS: cache; RapidSign: emailer).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse.DownstreamServices
member.summary: Additional downstream probes keyed by logical service name (e.g. `accounts`, `billing`, `eapp`). Order is not significant.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ReadinessResponse.CheckedAt
member.summary: Wall-clock time at which this readiness evaluation ran.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProbeResult
member.summary: ProbeResult is the per-dependency readiness outcome. Carried inside every readiness response across the platform.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProbeResult.Status
member.summary: Current serving status of this dependency.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProbeResult.LatencyMs
member.summary: Observed round-trip latency of the probe in milliseconds. Zero when the probe could not complete (status == NOT_SERVING with a synchronous failure or UNKNOWN with a timeout).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProbeResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable explanation when `status` is not `SERVING`. Empty on a healthy probe. Intended for operator dashboards; programmatic consumers must switch on `status`, not parse this string.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.ProbeResult.CheckedAt
member.summary: Wall-clock time at which this specific probe was evaluated.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.LivenessResponse
member.summary: LivenessResponse is the minimal success body for GET /health and GET /ready per the platform health/readiness contract. Body is exactly {"status":"ok"}.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.LivenessResponse.Status
member.summary: Liveness/readiness state. Only `ok` is ever emitted on success; a failing probe returns ProblemDetails on HTTP 503 instead.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.LivenessResponse.Types
member.summary: Container for nested types declared in the LivenessResponse message type.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.LivenessResponse.Types.Status
member.summary: Status enumerates the probe outcomes. Exists inside the message so the wire type is unambiguously scoped to the liveness contract.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.Core.Api.V1.LivenessResponse.Types.Status.Ok
member.summary: Process is alive (liveness) or ready to serve traffic (readiness).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.ProxyReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from api/proxy/v1/proxy.proto

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallRequest
member.summary: CallRequest is the structured envelope for a proxy call. Mirrors the Algosure HMAC envelope: callers sign over method + path + body hash + timestamp + sessionId; the proxy verifies the signature, resolves `scope_host` to a scope, and forwards the call.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallRequest.Target
member.summary: Target identifies the upstream endpoint to call.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallRequest.Body
member.summary: Body is the raw request body forwarded to the upstream. Opaque to the proxy beyond hashing it for signature verification.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallRequest.Auth
member.summary: Auth carries the inbound Algosure HMAC envelope. Required on every /v1/call; absent or invalid auth fails closed with HTTP 401 and a ProblemDetails-shaped JSON body on the HTTP edge.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallRequest.Integration
member.summary: Integration identifies the configured integration when callers use integration id/uuid routing (parity with JSON /v1/call). Omit when `target` alone fully specifies the outbound call; when set, exactly one identifier must appear inside `integration`.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.Target
member.summary: Target identifies the upstream endpoint a Call dispatches to. Stripe-style snake_case at the wire level.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.Target.Host
member.summary: Host is the upstream hostname (no scheme, no path). Subject to the per-integration allowlist; a host outside the allowlist returns HTTP 403 with `ErrorCode` set to `ERROR_CODE_FORBIDDEN` in the ProblemDetails payload.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.Target.Method
member.summary: Method is the HTTP method to use (e.g. `POST`, `GET`). Overrides the integration's default method when set.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.Target.Path
member.summary: Path is the upstream request path (URL-decoded, leading slash).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.AlgosureAuth
member.summary: AlgosureAuth carries the inbound HMAC envelope the caller signed. The wire headers `*Host`, `*Timestamp`, `*sessionId` map to the `scope_host`, `timestamp`, and `session_id` fields respectively; `authorization` maps to the standard `Authorization` header.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.AlgosureAuth.Authorization
member.summary: Authorization is the literal value of the inbound `Authorization` header (the full `Algosure-HMAC-SHA256 ...` string).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.AlgosureAuth.ScopeHost
member.summary: ScopeHost is the Algosure salt-serving scope host — the logical scope the caller is operating against, as carried in the inbound `*Host` header. Distinct from `Target.host`, which is the upstream API hostname the proxy dials. Field number 2 is preserved from the prior `host` name; the rename is source-only.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.AlgosureAuth.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp is the value of the inbound `*Timestamp` header — the RFC3339 wall-clock time the signature was computed.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.AlgosureAuth.SessionId
member.summary: SessionId is the value of the inbound `*sessionId` header — a caller-chosen opaque token bound into the signature to defeat replay across sessions.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallResponse
member.summary: CallResponse echoes the upstream response verbatim. The proxy does not interpret the body — pass-through is the contract — but it does surface the upstream HTTP status and forwarded headers so callers can react without parsing the body.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallResponse.Status
member.summary: Status is the upstream HTTP status code.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallResponse.Body
member.summary: Body is the raw upstream response body forwarded unchanged.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.CallResponse.Headers
member.summary: Headers is the upstream response header set after the proxy's egress filter (Set-Cookie and other sensitive headers stripped). Keys are lowercased; duplicate header values are joined with `, `.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef
member.summary: IntegrationRef identifies a pre-configured integration the proxy should dispatch to. Callers supply exactly one of `uuid` (preferred, scope-opaque) or `id` (legacy BIGSERIAL). Supplying both or neither is invalid input for the proxy contract.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.Uuid
member.summary: Uuid is the scope-opaque public identifier for the integration.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.HasUuid
member.summary: Gets whether the "uuid" field is set

member.name: M:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.ClearUuid
member.summary: Clears the value of the oneof if it's currently set to "uuid"

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.Id
member.summary: Id is the legacy BIGSERIAL primary key. Kept for backwards compatibility during the cutover window.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.HasId
member.summary: Gets whether the "id" field is set

member.name: M:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.ClearId
member.summary: Clears the value of the oneof if it's currently set to "id"

member.name: T:IsaSdk.Proxy.Api.V1.IntegrationRef.IdentifierOneofCase
member.summary: Enum of possible cases for the "identifier" oneof.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CommonReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from api/rapidsign/v1/common.proto

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DocumentsReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from api/rapidsign/v1/documents.proto

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DocumentStatus
member.summary: DocumentStatus tracks the lifecycle state of a document.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DocumentStatus.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DocumentStatus.Pending
member.summary: Packet rendered and stored; awaiting signature(s).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DocumentStatus.Notified
member.summary: Signer-notification email accepted by the emailer.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.PdfRenderSource
member.summary: PdfRenderSource references one PDF input the renderer must fetch, optionally pinned to an expected SHA-256 hash for integrity. URLs are fetched server-side; the caller never proxies binary content.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.PdfRenderSource.Url
member.summary: Fully-qualified URL to fetch the source PDF from. Required.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.PdfRenderSource.ExpectedHash
member.summary: Optional hex-encoded SHA-256 of the expected source bytes. When present the renderer aborts with a validation error if the fetch does not match.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest
member.summary:
CreateDocumentRequest is the body for POST /v1/documents.
`data` is the templating bundle passed verbatim into the renderer; its shape is renderer-specific so it is typed as a free-form Struct. `expected_hashes` lets callers pin known sources by name (e.g. an integration that already computed the source SHA at upload time).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.SessionId
member.summary: Originating session identifier; binds the document to a single signing session for replay protection. Required.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.Packet
member.summary: Ordered list of PDF sources to fetch and merge into the packet.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.Data
member.summary: Template bundle the renderer interpolates into the packet.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.RemoteAllowed
member.summary: When true (default) the document may be signed remotely. When false the renderer marks the packet as in-person only.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.SignIds
member.summary: Pre-issued sign ids the renderer should reuse instead of minting new ones. When empty the service mints ids per signer.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.ViewOnlyId
member.summary: Optional view-only id for read-only audit access to the packet.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.UserAgent
member.summary: User-agent of the signer's browser captured at render time, for audit-trail provenance.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.IsProduction
member.summary: When true the renderer applies production policy (binding legal text, watermark suppression). False keeps the rendered packet labelled as non-production for compliance.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.BindingLegalText
member.summary: Legal text to embed beneath each signature block. Empty disables the embed.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.Ttl
member.summary: Time-to-live duration applied to the stored packet. ISO-8601 duration string (e.g. `P30D`). Empty applies the service default.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentRequest.ExpectedHashes
member.summary: Map from source URL → expected SHA-256 hex. Equivalent to PdfRenderSource.expected_hash but keyed for callers that build hashes out-of-band.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentResponse
member.summary: CreateDocumentResponse is the success body for POST /v1/documents.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentResponse.PacketStored
member.summary: True when the rendered packet was persisted to storage. A false value is never returned on a 2xx response — the renderer surfaces a 5xx instead.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.CreateDocumentResponse.Hashes
member.summary: Map from rendered source URL → SHA-256 of the bytes actually fetched and embedded. Always populated.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentRequest
member.summary: SignDocumentRequest is the body for POST /v1/documents/{sign_id}/sign.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentRequest.SessionId
member.summary: Originating session identifier; must match the session_id used when the document was created.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentRequest.Secret
member.summary: Optional signing secret (one-time code) when the document was created with a secret-protected sign_id.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentRequest.UserMetadata
member.summary: Opaque signer metadata (browser fingerprint, ip, etc.) captured at signing time, stored verbatim for the audit trail.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentResponse
member.summary: SignDocumentResponse is the success body for POST /v1/documents/{sign_id}/sign.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentResponse.SignId
member.summary: The sign id that was signed. Echoed from the path.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.SignDocumentResponse.Status
member.summary: Lifecycle state after the signature was saved. Always `saved` on a 2xx response.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.GetDocumentRequest
member.summary: GetDocumentRequest is the query for GET /v1/documents/{sign_id}.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.GetDocumentRequest.SessionId
member.summary: Originating session identifier; the service returns 404 when this does not match the session the signature was captured under.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.GetDocumentResponse
member.summary: GetDocumentResponse is the success body for GET /v1/documents/{sign_id}.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.GetDocumentResponse.SignId
member.summary: The sign id this signature was captured for.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.GetDocumentResponse.UserMetadata
member.summary: Opaque signer metadata as supplied at signing time.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.GetDocumentResponse.Timestamp
member.summary: Unix-seconds timestamp at which the signature was saved.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentRequest
member.summary: DownloadDocumentRequest is the query for GET /v1/documents/{sign_id}/download.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentResponse
member.summary: DownloadDocumentResponse is the success body for GET /v1/documents/{sign_id}/download.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentResponse.SignId
member.summary: The sign id whose document is being downloaded.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentResponse.PdfGzipBase64
member.summary: Gzipped PDF payload, base64-encoded. Always set on 2xx.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentResponse.Compressed
member.summary: True when `pdf_gzip_base64` is gzip-compressed (always true for this version; reserved for a future uncompressed transport).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentResponse.BindingLegalText
member.summary: The binding legal text that was embedded at render time (empty when none was requested).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.DownloadDocumentResponse.SizeBytes
member.summary: Size of the uncompressed PDF in bytes.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.NotifyDocumentRequest
member.summary: NotifyDocumentRequest is the body for POST /v1/documents/{sign_id}/notify.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.NotifyDocumentRequest.Key
member.summary: Optional template/notification key (selects which template the emailer renders). Empty applies the default signer template.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.NotifyDocumentResponse
member.summary: NotifyDocumentResponse is the success body for POST /v1/documents/{sign_id}/notify.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.NotifyDocumentResponse.SignId
member.summary: The sign id the notification refers to.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.RapidSign.Api.V1.NotifyDocumentResponse.Status
member.summary: Lifecycle state after the notification was accepted. Always `notified` on a 2xx response.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountsReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from api/zyins/v1/accounts.proto

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanTier
member.summary: PlanTier is the subscription plan's pricing tier. Wire values are lowercase single words per ADR-012. Ordering is from least to most inclusive; new tiers are appended (never inserted) to preserve the numeric ordering for consumers that switch on it.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanTier.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateAccountRequest
member.summary: CreateAccountRequest is the body for POST /v1/accounts.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateAccountRequest.Id
member.summary: Externally assigned account identifier. Must be unique.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateAccountRequest.Email
member.summary: Primary contact email for the account.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateAccountRequest.PlanId
member.summary: Identifier of the subscription plan to assign at creation. Optional; empty string leaves the account on the default plan.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.GetAccountRequest
member.summary: GetAccountRequest identifies an account by id.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListAccountsRequest
member.summary: ListAccountsRequest is the empty request body for GET /v1/accounts.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListAccountsResponse
member.summary: ListAccountsResponse is the 200 body from ListAccounts.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListAccountsResponse.Livemode
member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListAccountsResponse.Data
member.summary: The accounts visible to the caller.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.UpdateAccountPlanRequest
member.summary: UpdateAccountPlanRequest is the body for PUT /v1/accounts/{id}/plan.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.UpdateAccountPlanRequest.PlanId
member.summary: Identifier of the subscription plan to assign. Required.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountDetail
member.summary: AccountDetail is the canonical account resource shape returned by every account RPC.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountDetail.Livemode
member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountDetail.Email
member.summary: Primary contact email for the account.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountDetail.PlanId
member.summary: Identifier of the currently assigned subscription plan. Empty string if the account is on the default plan.

member.summary: Externally assigned plan identifier. Must be unique.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreatePlanRequest.Description
member.summary: Long-form description shown on billing pages.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreatePlanRequest.Limits
member.summary: Per-plan usage limits. Optional; omitted means unlimited.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanDetail
member.summary: PlanDetail is the canonical subscription plan resource shape. Returned by GetPlan, CreatePlan, and ListPlans (nested).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanDetail.Livemode
member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanDetail.Limits
member.summary: Per-plan usage limits. Omitted means unlimited.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanDetail.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the plan is available for new assignments.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanDetail.Rates
member.summary: Per-metric rates configured for this plan. Populated by GetPlan; empty on ListPlans and CreatePlan responses.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanLimits
member.summary: PlanLimits captures the usage ceilings enforced for a plan. A zero value in any field means "unlimited for that dimension". The server also enforces per-token and global rate limits; those are separate.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanLimits.RequestsPerMonth
member.summary: Maximum authenticated requests per month. Zero means unlimited.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanLimits.MaxTokens
member.summary: Maximum API tokens the account may hold concurrently. Zero means unlimited.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.PlanLimits.RequestsPerSecond
member.summary: Maximum concurrent requests per second. Zero means unlimited.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.GetPlanRatesRequest
member.summary: GetPlanRatesRequest identifies the plan whose rates are requested.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListPlanRatesResponse
member.summary: ListPlanRatesResponse is the 200 body from GetPlanRates.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListPlanRatesResponse.Livemode
member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ListPlanRatesResponse.Data
member.summary: The rates configured for the plan.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateRequest
member.summary: SetPlanRateRequest is the body for PUT /v1/plans/{plan_id}/rates/{metric}. The server upserts by (plan_id, metric): if a rate for the metric already exists it is replaced; otherwise a new rate is inserted.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateRequest.Metric
member.summary: Metric identifier (path parameter). Conventionally the endpoint name being priced, e.g. `prequalify`, `quote`, or `datasets.fetch`.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateRequest.Amount
member.summary: Cost per unit of the metric, in the minor unit of `currency` (e.g. cents for USD). A decimal string to preserve sub-cent precision.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateRequest.EffectiveAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the rate takes effect. Empty string means "immediately on upsert".

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateRequest.IncludedFree
member.summary: Requests included at no additional charge before `amount` applies. Zero means every request is billed at `amount`.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateResponse
member.summary: SetPlanRateResponse is the 200 body from SetPlanRate.

member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateResponse.PlanId
member.summary: Plan identifier the rate belongs to.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateResponse.Amount
member.summary: Cost per unit of the metric, in the minor unit of `currency`. A decimal string to preserve sub-cent precision.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateResponse.EffectiveAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the rate took effect.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.SetPlanRateResponse.IncludedFree
member.summary: Requests included at no additional charge before `amount` applies.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Gender
member.summary: Gender captures biological sex for underwriting. Canonical wire values are lowercase full words (`male`, `female`) per ADR-012. The server normalizes legacy inputs (`M`, `F`, `Male`) to canonical values in responses.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Gender.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Gender.Male
member.summary: Male biological sex for underwriting (wire value: `male`).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Gender.Female
member.summary: Female biological sex for underwriting (wire value: `female`).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenStatus
member.summary: TokenStatus is the API token lifecycle state per ADR-012.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenStatus.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenStatus.Expired
member.summary: Token aged out of its validity window (wire: `expired`). Permanent.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenStatus.Banned
member.summary: Token was permanently banned by an administrator (wire: `banned`). Unlike revoked, a banned token can never be reinstated.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountStatus
member.summary: AccountStatus is the account lifecycle state per ADR-012.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.AccountStatus.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseStatus
member.summary: LicenseStatus is the license validation state.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseStatus.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseStatus.Valid
member.summary: License is authenticated and currently usable (wire: `valid`).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseStatus.Invalid
member.summary: Credentials do not match a known license (wire: `invalid`).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseStatus.Inactive
member.summary: License exists but is not currently usable (wire: `inactive`).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ProductClass
member.summary: ProductClass is the insurance product family classification.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ProductClass.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.DeathBenefitRank
member.summary: DeathBenefitRank is the underwriting rank category.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.DeathBenefitRank.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.QuoteType
member.summary: QuoteType is the quote computation mode.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.QuoteType.Unspecified
member.summary: Default zero value. Never emitted by the server.

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.QuoteType.FaceAmounts
member.summary: Compute premiums for given face-value amounts (wire: `face_amounts`).

member.name: F:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.QuoteType.MonthlyBudget
member.summary: Compute coverage achievable for a given monthly budget (wire: `monthly_budget`).

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Envelope
member.summary: Envelope is the standard response wrapper per the response-envelope contract. Every success response carries `object`, `livemode`, and `request_id`; resource-specific bodies live in a typed `data` field on each response message (not this shared type — proto does not inherit). This message exists for documentation of the contract; concrete responses duplicate the three fields explicitly so each has a typed `data` shape rather than a `google.protobuf.Any`.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Envelope.Object
member.summary: Resource type discriminator. Concrete values depend on the endpoint (e.g. "quote_result", "license", "token").

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Envelope.Livemode
member.summary: True in production; false for test-mode responses.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Envelope.RequestId
member.summary: Unique request identifier; echoed into all log lines for the request.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.Envelope.Data
member.summary: Endpoint-specific payload. Concrete responses replace this with a typed message; it appears here only to document the envelope shape.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicensesReflection

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseCredentialsRequest
member.summary: LicenseCredentialsRequest is the common body for legacy license operations. Either `keycode` (raw, SHA-512 hashed before storage) or `order_hash` (pre-hashed) identifies the order; `email` scopes it. Fields not applicable to a given operation are ignored server-side.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseCredentialsRequest.OrderHash

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseCredentialsRequest.Email
member.summary: Email address associated with the license.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseCredentialsRequest.MaxActivations

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseCredentialsRequest.EnterpriseUser
member.summary: Enterprise user email to link (signup only).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.LicenseCredentialsRequest.Authcode
member.summary: Admin authorization code (reserved for future use).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateLicenseOrderResponse.Status

member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.summary: The tokens owned by the authenticated account, redacted.

member.summary: CreateTokenRequest is the body for POST /v1/tokens.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenRequest.Name
member.summary: Human-readable label for the token (e.g. "Production API key").

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenRequest.Scopes
member.summary: Permission scopes granted to this token (e.g. ["prequalify", "datasets"]).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenRequest.ExpiresInDays
member.summary: Number of days until the token expires. Zero or absent means the token does not expire on a fixed schedule.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse
member.summary: CreateTokenResponse is the 201 body for Create and the 200 body for Rotate. This is the only shape that carries the plaintext `token`.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.Livemode
member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.Token
member.summary: The full plaintext token value. Only returned here and on rotation.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.Hint
member.summary: Last four characters of the token, used for later identification.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.Scopes
member.summary: Permission scopes granted to this token.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.ExpiresAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 expiry timestamp. Empty string means the token does not expire.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.PreviousTokenRevokesAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the *previous* token is scheduled to revoke. Populated only on Rotate responses with a non-zero grace window; empty on Create or immediate revocation. Task #117.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.CreateTokenResponse.PreviousTokenId
member.summary: Identifier of the *previous* token (the one being rotated). Populated only on Rotate responses; empty on Create. Task #117.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.GetTokenRequest
member.summary: GetTokenRequest identifies a token by its database ID.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.DeleteTokenRequest
member.summary: DeleteTokenRequest identifies a token to revoke without a reason. Deprecated path; use RevokeTokenRequest instead.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.DeleteTokenResponse
member.summary: DeleteTokenResponse is the empty 204 body from Delete.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RevokeTokenRequest
member.summary: RevokeTokenRequest records the reason for a token revocation.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RevokeTokenRequest.Reason
member.summary: Operator-supplied reason captured in the audit log.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.ReinstateTokenRequest
member.summary: ReinstateTokenRequest targets a previously revoked token.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.BanTokenRequest
member.summary: BanTokenRequest permanently bans a token and records the reason.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.BanTokenRequest.Reason
member.summary: Operator-supplied reason captured in the audit log.

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RotateTokenRequest
member.summary: RotateTokenRequest targets an existing token; the server issues a new token with the same scopes and schedules the old one for revocation after a grace window.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RotateTokenRequest.TokenId
member.summary: Identifier of the token to rotate. May be supplied as the path parameter on `/v1/tokens/{token_id}/rotate` or in the request body on the legacy `/v1/tokens/rotate` binding.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RotateTokenRequest.ExpiresInDays
member.summary: Expiry for the replacement token in days. Zero or absent keeps the original expiry policy.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RotateTokenRequest.GracePeriodSeconds
member.summary:
Seconds the old token remains active after rotation before the sweeper revokes it. Absent applies the default 2,592,000 (30 days). Range 0 to 7,776,000 (90 days). Explicit 0 revokes the old token immediately; the new token still ships in the response.
Task #117 + #118: handler stamps `revokes_at = now() + grace_period_seconds`; the sweeper Lambda flips status to `revoked` when the deadline elapses.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RotateTokenRequest.HasGracePeriodSeconds
member.summary: Gets whether the "grace_period_seconds" field is set

member.name: M:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.RotateTokenRequest.ClearGracePeriodSeconds
member.summary: Clears the value of the "grace_period_seconds" field

member.name: T:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail
member.summary: TokenDetail is the canonical token resource shape returned by every read and lifecycle-transition endpoint (except Create and Rotate, which additionally return the plaintext token value).

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.Livemode
member.summary: True for live mode, false for test mode.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.Hint
member.summary: Last four characters of the token.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.Scopes
member.summary: Permission scopes granted to this token.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.RevokedReason
member.summary: Reason recorded when the token was revoked or banned. Empty otherwise.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.ExpiresAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 expiry timestamp. Empty string means the token does not expire.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.RevokedAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 revocation timestamp. Empty string if the token has never been revoked.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.LastUsedAt
member.summary: RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent authenticated request made with this token. Empty string if the token has never been used.

member.name: P:IsaSdk.ZyINS.Api.V1.TokenDetail.RevokesAt

member.exception: When keycode or email is missing.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Isa.WithLicense(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ergonomic license-mode factory. Equivalent to passing a with just Keycode + Email. The SDK mints a device id automatically; an in-memory credential store backs the license key.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Isa.FromEnv
member.summary: Construct from environment variables. Reads ISA_LICENSE_KEYCODE + ISA_LICENSE_EMAIL and returns a license-mode . Equivalent to Isa.WithLicense() with no args, but resolves synchronously without a Task.

member.exception: When sessionId or sessionSecret is missing.

member.summary: Default constructor — non-session callers see at .

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.PrequalifySubClient.WithRawResponseAsync(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.PrequalifyInput,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.PrequalifySubClient.LegacyBlobAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Raw-blob variant of . Accepts a pre-encoded prequalify payload (the wire shape produced by bpp2.0's prepEncObj / prepEncObjV2 encoders) verbatim and reuses the rest of the prequalify transport — auth headers, idempotency-key derivation, error funnel, response parsing.
The server accepts both the typed and legacy-blob shapes on the same /v1/prequalify path. This entry point exists so consumers do not have to restructure their encoder to take advantage of the SDK transport.
member.param: The pre-encoded prequalify payload. Serialized to JSON verbatim and sent as the request body.

member.summary: Run a quote call and return the raw HTTP response alongside the parsed body.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IRequestSigner
member.summary: Strategy that mutates a to add auth headers. Hides the bearer/license/session choice from the dispatcher and sub-clients.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IRequestSigner.Sign(Sah.Sdk.Core.TransportRequest)
member.summary: Return a new request with auth headers applied.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseSigner
member.summary: Apply Authorization: License <base64(keycode:email)> + X-Device-ID + X-Device-Signature headers. The device-signature primitive is implemented in the shared Core transport-helpers package; this signer wires it into the request pipeline.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.SessionRequestSigner
member.summary: Apply the canonical four-header session-auth bundle (Authorization: Bearer … + X-Isa-Session-Id + X-Isa-Timestamp + X-Isa-Signature) to every outbound request. The signing primitive lives in ; this adapter just plumbs the session credential through and lets the canonical helper compute the bytes.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions.Token
member.summary: API token (required for the bearer-mode constructor; ignored when a is supplied internally for License/Session modes). Typically begins with isa_live_ or isa_test_.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions.Transport
member.summary: Transport override; defaults to a fresh .

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions.Logger
member.summary: Debug logger override; defaults to which reads ISA_LOG at call time and writes to stderr.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient
member.summary: The ZyINS Tier 3 client. Construct once per token; methods are grouped under typed sub-clients.

member.name: F:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient.DefaultBaseUrl
member.summary: Production ZyINS endpoint. Override only for staging / local.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient.Licenses
member.summary: Public BPP license-lifecycle operations (Check, Deactivate). Targets the proto-backed `/v1/licenses/*` surface.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient.Cases
member.summary: Case create + share. Targets `POST /v1/case` and the `POST /v1/email/enqueue` case-share helper.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient.CredentialState
member.summary: Shared credential state for license-mode clients. Null when the client was constructed in bearer or session mode.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient.#ctor(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions)
member.summary: Advanced construction with the full options record.

member.summary: Internal constructor that accepts a pre-built signer (used by the License/Session factories).

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClient.#ctor(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IRequestSigner,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IsaCredentialState)
member.summary: Internal constructor accepting a signer plus an optional credential state. License-mode factories pass the shared state so the can auto-stash the license key on successful activation.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IEnvironment
member.summary: Source of environment variables. Defaults to the OS; tests substitute an in-memory implementation.

member.summary: Return the variable's value, or null when unset / empty.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials
member.summary: Per-factory option records. License and Session take more than one credential, so they have dedicated input types.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials.Email
member.summary: Agent's login email (used as the lookup key on the server).

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials.DeviceId
member.summary: Device identifier; on first run, callers may leave this null and the SDK will mint a fresh GUID. Persistence to disk is the caller's responsibility.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials.SigningSecret
member.summary: HMAC signing secret derived from the license issuance handshake.

member.name: P:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.SessionCredentials.SessionSecret
member.summary: HMAC signing secret returned by the session-mint endpoint.

member.name: T:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory
member.summary: Top-level factory. Hides the strategy choice (bearer / license / session) behind three named static methods. Each method reads sensible defaults from the environment when called with no arguments.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory.WithBearer(System.String,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions)
member.summary: Construct a client authenticated with a long-lived bearer token. When is null/empty, reads ISA_TOKEN from the environment.
member.param: Optional bearer token. When null/empty, env is consulted.
Optional client options (base URL, timeout, transport).
member.returns: A fully constructed in bearer mode.
member.exception: Thrown when no token is supplied AND ISA_TOKEN is unset.

example.code: // Reads ISA_TOKEN from the environment: var isa = Isa.WithBearer();

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory.WithBearer(System.String,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IEnvironment)
member.summary: Test seam: same as but with an injectable environment so tests don't have to mutate process state.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory.WithLicense(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions)
member.summary: Construct a client authenticated with a license keycode + email pair. When is null, reads ISA_LICENSE_KEYCODE + ISA_LICENSE_EMAIL (and optional ISA_DEVICE_ID, ISA_LICENSE_SIGNING_SECRET) from the environment.
member.param: Optional license credentials. When null, env is consulted.
member.returns: A fully constructed in license mode.
member.exception: Thrown when keycode or email is missing from credentials and env.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory.WithLicense(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IEnvironment)
member.summary: Test seam: same as but with an injectable environment.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory.WithLicense(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.LicenseCredentials,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.IEnvironment,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ICredentialStore)
member.summary: Build a license-mode client with an attached credential store. The store backs the shared so the can auto-stash the license key on successful activation.

member.name: M:Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyinsFactory.WithSession(Sah.Sdk.Zyins.SessionCredentials,Sah.Sdk.Zyins.ZyInsClientOptions)
member.summary: Construct a client authenticated with a session id + secret pair. When is null, reads ISA_SESSION_ID + ISA_SESSION_SECRET from the environment.
member.param: Optional session credentials. When null, env is consulted.
member.returns: A fully constructed in session mode.
member.exception: Thrown when sessionId or sessionSecret is missing from credentials and env.

example.code: // Reads ISA_SESSION_ID and ISA_SESSION_SECRET from the environment: var isa = Isa.WithSession();

member.summary: Test seam: same as but with an injectable environment.
